text: git layout should follow open standard: https://agentskills.io/specification . according to that, gittoc/ , gittoc_lib/ , tests/ and setup would have to be moved into scripts/. EXAMPLE_PROMPTS.md should be moved into references/example_prompts.md . SKILL.md metadata should have license field (MIT, as specified in LICENSE file) and version field (as in gittob_lib/__init__.py). PLEASE VERIFY this information before implementing.
skill setup (symlink from .claude/skills/gittoc.md -> SKILL.md) for claude code works seemlessly as is.
